name: Dr Xenon and Dr Malory
description:
"Why don't you jump, you fucking pussy?"

SET BEFORE THE EVENTS OF TDX

Dr Malory is going to have to sacrifice herself to the Calamity. Why? Because it is what her boss wants, and she doesn't really have a choice.

Whose side are you on? Dr. Xenon or Dr. Malory can't pick both....only one :(

Based on the song, Rusty by Tyler, The Creator (specifically the Last verse from Earl)
